description: Legal document. Location: Fustat. Dated: 1553 Seleucid = 1241/42 CE. The content is mostly missing, but some of it may be decipherable. Mentions the scholar (talmid) Shelomo b. Yefet; R. David; a virgin girl (named Malīḥa?); R. Yosef; [Mo?]she ha-Dayyan.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
